paper.title: Scalable Delphi: Large Language Models for Structured Risk Estimation

project_page.release_link_observation: The acquired project page links the author-hosted paper and arXiv record. No code, dataset, result archive, GitHub repository, Zenodo record, or Hugging Face release is linked on this page. This is an acquisition-time observation, not proof that no release exists elsewhere.

verification.inspection_note: The extraction contains the title, abstract, body, references, prompt/persona appendices, and benchmark-data tables. This verifies extraction integrity only and is not a deep review.
